auth.login_intro: Sign in with your school account.

errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked after too many failed attempts. Try again later.

me.title: My profile
me.preferences_desc: Language, region and formats for your account.

classes.title: Classes
classes.name: Name
classes.school_id_admin_hint: As admin you must set the school explicitly.
classes.archive_confirm: Archive {{name}}? The row is kept; you can restore via the DB.
classes.error_school_id_required: Admins must provide a school ID.
classes.error_overlapping: Student already has an active membership in this class.
classes.teachers_description: KL / co-KL / substitute with date range.
classes.assign_teacher_description: Pick a teacher, role and date range.
classes.subject: Subject
classes.subject_teachers_description: Subject teachers with subject and date range.
classes.assign_subject_teacher_description: Pick a teacher, subject and date range.
classes.students_description: Active memberships. Mid-year transfers clamp the previous one to valid_from − 1s.
classes.add_student_description: Pick a student and set the start date.
classes.mid_year_hint: Mid-year transfers automatically close the previous active membership.
classes.bulk_add_description: Search and select multiple students at once.
classes.bulk_add_partial_error: Some students could not be added:
classes.move_class_description: {{count}} active students will be moved to the target class. Existing memberships are ended automatically.
classes.move_class_empty: No active students in this class.
classes.promote_confirm_desc: {{count}} students will be moved from «{{source}}» to «{{target}}».
classes.promote_no_students: No active students in the source class.
classes.promote_archive_warning: «{{name}}» will be archived after the transition.

users.title: Users
users.intro: Teachers and students from Active Directory.
users.name: Name
users.search_placeholder: Search by name or sign-in name…

detail.no_classes: Not assigned to any active class.
detail.section_mail_desc: Pick the domain from the allowed list.
detail.section_device_desc: Primary device comes from AD (read-only). Loan device during repair is managed here.
detail.not_found_desc: This user does not exist or you don't have permission.
detail.error_admin_only: Only administration may change these fields.
detail.error_upn_conflict: This sign-in address is already taken.
detail.error_user_not_in_ad: User not found in Active Directory. Check the sync.
detail.error_mail_domains_missing: Mail domains are not yet configured. Add them in Administration → System settings.
detail.error_domain_not_allowed: This domain is not on the allow-list.

field.sam_hint: Up to 20 chars. Letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore only.
field.temp_device_name_hint: While the primary device is in repair.
field.domains_missing: No mail domains configured. Administration → System settings.

password_reset.title: Reset student password
password_reset.mode_generate_desc: Magister creates a random password and shows it once.
password_reset.mode_manual_desc: Type a password yourself (e.g. when you've already handed one out).
password_reset.force_change_label: Require student to change password on next sign-in
password_reset.success_generate_note: Write it down or hand it over now — it will not be shown again.
password_reset.error_student_disabled: Student is disabled in AD — reset not possible.
password_reset.error_student_not_in_ad: Student not found in AD. Check AD sync.
password_reset.error_not_a_student: This user is not a student.
password_reset.error_password_policy: Password does not meet AD policy.

errors.title: Error
errors.ad_unavailable: Active Directory is unreachable — data may be stale.
errors.user_not_synced: Your account is not yet synced into Magister. Contact IT.
errors.csrf_invalid: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: OIDC and AD configuration. Changes take effect immediately, no restart.
settings.mail_section_desc: Domains offered as UPN and mail suffix in the user-edit form.
settings.oidc_section_desc: Issuer, client ID, client secret and redirect URI for teacher + admin sign-in.
settings.ad_section_desc: Domain controllers, bind DN/password and search base for the user sync.

test_ad_reason.ad_config: Configuration incomplete: check the domain controllers and the bind DN/password.
test_ad_reason.ad_unreachable: Domain controller unreachable. Check the hostname, port 636 and firewall.
test_ad_reason.ad_tls: TLS/certificate error. Check the DC certificate and the configured CA bundle.
test_ad_reason.ad_timeout: Timed out waiting for the domain controller to respond.
test_ad_reason.ad_auth: Bind rejected. Check the service account's bind DN and password.

settings.test_ad_hint: Tests the saved service account against AD. Save first.
settings.sync_ad_hint: Runs a full AD sync immediately. Otherwise it runs automatically at the configured interval.

field.oidc_client_secret_hint: Leave empty to keep the stored value.
field.ad_bind_password_hint: Leave empty to keep the stored value.
field.ad_tls_ca_pem_hint: Optional. Paste the domain's root or intermediate certificate as PEM. The domain controller is verified against it. Leave empty to use the operating-system trust store.
field.ad_computers_search_base_hint: Optional. Path to the Computer-OU; devices are matched via managedBy=<user-dn>. Leave empty to disable device sync.

settings.ad_bind_gssapi_hint: When enabled, Magister authenticates to AD via a Kerberos keytab — no bind password needed (Bind DN/password are ignored). Requires a configured keytab (see runbook ad-gssapi-bind). Disabled = classic bind with DN + password.
settings.ad_tls_skip_verify_hint: When enabled, the domain controller's certificate is not verified. Use only as a stop-gap until the CA certificate has been imported.
settings.ad_tls_skip_verify_warning: Warning: the connection is encrypted but not authenticated — vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks.
settings.provisioning_hint: Target OUs for AD accounts created via the student import. The student OU follows the class Zyklus. Leaving one empty disables provisioning for that bucket.
settings.zyklus_hint: Zyklus boundaries by grade: Zyklus 1 up to and including the first number, Zyklus 2 up to the second, Zyklus 3 above (default 2 / 6 → Z1: 1–2, Z2: 3–6, Z3: 7+).

local_admin.title: Local admin account
local_admin.description: Break-glass access for initial setup and recovery when Entra ID is unavailable.
local_admin.change_password_description: Set a new password. At least 12 characters.
local_admin.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
local_admin.error_not_configured: Local admin account is not configured.

substitutions.title: Substitutions
substitutions.intro: Time-limited substitution assignments across all classes.
substitutions.create_hint: To create a new substitution, open a class under

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.disabled_intro: These accounts are disabled in AD and cannot sign in.
dashboard.disabled_more: And {{count}} more — full list under Users.

imports.title: CSV Imports
imports.intro: Upload class structures, student and teacher assignments via CSV. Data is staged first (diff preview), then applied on confirmation.
imports.kind_classes_desc: Create or update classes. Columns: name, kuerzel, jahrgangsstufe.
imports.kind_class_memberships_desc: Assign students to a class. UPN must exist in AD. Columns: student_upn, class_name, valid_from, valid_to.
imports.kind_class_teachers_desc: Assign class teachers (haupt/co/stellvertretung). Columns: teacher_upn, class_name, role, valid_from, valid_to.
imports.kind_students_desc: Creates new AD accounts and assigns them to a class. Passwords are generated. Columns: given_name, surname, display_name, upn, sam_account_name, class, valid_from, force_change.
imports.credentials_ready: {{count}} account(s) created — download the credentials now
imports.credentials_hint: Passwords are shown only once and stored nowhere. Download the PDFs now (per-student hand-out + class table).
imports.error_invalid_header: CSV header doesn't match the selected kind. Download the template and compare columns.
imports.error_not_utf8: File is not UTF-8 encoded. Save the CSV as UTF-8.

privacy.section_desc: Everything Magister knows about this person — incl. audit log. The fetch itself is audited.
privacy.title: Subject-access export
privacy.description: Full overview of all data Magister stores about this person.
privacy.audit_truncated: Preview truncated at 100 entries — full list in CSV export (total: {{total}}).

reports.title: Reports
reports.workload_intro: Active class-teacher roles per teacher, broken down by role.

letters.title: Generate parent letter
letters.template_enrollment_desc: Welcome letter at the start of the school year with class teacher and list of enclosures.
letters.template_class_change_desc: Notice about a transfer from one class to another — the account stays unchanged.
letters.template_password_handout_desc: Hand the temporary password to the parents (printed letter).
letters.temp_password_hint: Not stored — enter right after a manual password reset.

errors.missing_active_class: The student has no active class.
errors.missing_school_year_or_first_day: School year and first day are required.
errors.missing_old_class_or_effective_date: Previous class and effective date are required.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.intro: Read-only log of all mutations, scoped to your schools.

user_status.consequence_disable: The AD account will be disabled. The user can no longer sign in, and password resets are blocked. Class memberships are kept.
user_status.consequence_enable: The AD account will be re-enabled. The user will be able to sign in again.
user_status.reason_hint: Recorded in the audit log. Max 500 characters — never paste passwords.
user_status.error_cannot_disable_self: You cannot disable your own account.
user_status.error_not_found: User not found or outside your access.
user_status.error_user_not_in_ad: The account no longer exists in AD.

my_students.title: My students
my_students.intro: All students of the classes where you are KL or a subject teacher.
my_students.empty: You are currently not assigned to any class as KL or subject teacher.
